title: Add dropdown value to Monday.com using Make
excerpt:
Using make, I am trying to populate a dropdown column using add(split(value;,);value). If the column already has values, it works fine. But, if the column is blank is won’t populate. 
Is there any solution to this other …

posts.author: Soroh (Soroh Donn)
posts.cookedHtml:
Using make, I am trying to populate a dropdown column using add(split(value;,);value). If the column already has values, it works fine. But, if the column is blank is won’t populate.
Is there any solution to this other than creating separate modules for blank and non-blank columns?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Soroh!

Charlotte here for the monday team! What integration are you trying to set up with monday via Make?

It sounds like the Make team might be better equipped to answer why the column won’t populate - it could be a behavior expected of a specific integration if certain fields from the other platform are not supported when moving into monday.com.

You can reach out to them here. Definitely ask them if these columns are supported in the integration they set up.

Let us know if you run into any issues!
